_note: todo→research is Station 1 (Design Team) → Station 2 (Design System). Team Hire Gate is the human approval. design-brief-completeness-gate verifies the strategic brief was authored. aesthetic-lock-gate verifies the fan-out ran on top of the brief. Both must pass.
research→planning is Station 2 (Design System) → Station 3 (Brand Deliverables). DESIGN.md must lint clean AND have the 4 extended sections.
planning→implementation is Station 3 (Briefs) → Station 4 (Implementation). All four briefs must be owner-approved before Station 4 starts.
implementation→testing is Station 4 (Implementation) → Station 5 (E2E Proof). The critique panel must have run.
